import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)
    
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)
    
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_y = agent_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    norm_x = agent_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)
    
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_blue_pyramid = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 5) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    color_ids = state.grid[:, :, 1]
    
    # Blue pyramid
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (color_ids == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.minimum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    rel_pyr_dy = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_pyr_dx = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    dist_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2.0)
    blue_pyr_y_norm = blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x_norm = blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    
    # Yellow hex
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (color_ids == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.minimum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    rel_hex_dy = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_hex_dx = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    dist_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2.0)
    yel_hex_y_norm = yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    yel_hex_x_norm = yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    
    # Front tile
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(color_ids[front_y, front_x], 12)
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (color_ids[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) +
                      jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x)) == 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_door = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9) | (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 8)).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    agent_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Doors - track individually for 4-room navigation
    closed_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_locked = jnp.sum(locked_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    all_closed_locked = closed_mask | locked_mask
    door_count = jnp.sum(all_closed_locked).astype(jnp.float32)
    door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * all_closed_locked) / jnp.maximum(door_count, 1.0)
    door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * all_closed_locked) / jnp.maximum(door_count, 1.0)
    rel_door_dy = (door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_door_dx = (door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    dist_door = (jnp.abs(door_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(door_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2.0)
    
    # Task phase
    phase_need_pickup = (blue_pyr_exists * pocket_empty)
    phase_need_place = holding_green_ball
    
    # Step
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0
    
    # Large local view: 11x11 around agent (242 values)
    local_tiles = []
    for dy_l in range(-5, 6):
        for dx_l in range(-5, 6):
            gy = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_l, 0, H - 1)
            gx = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_l, 0, W - 1)
            t = tile_ids[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
            c = color_ids[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
            local_tiles.append(t)
            local_tiles.append(c)
    local_obs = jnp.stack(local_tiles)  # 242 elements
    
    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent (6)
        jnp.array([norm_y, norm_x]),
        dir_oh,
        
        # Pocket one-hot (25)
        pocket_tile_oh,
        pocket_color_oh,
        
        # Pocket flags (3)
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, holding_blue_pyramid]),
        
        # Blue pyramid (7)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y_norm, blue_pyr_x_norm,
                   rel_pyr_dy, rel_pyr_dx,
                   dist_pyr, blue_pyr_exists,
                   jnp.sign(rel_pyr_dy) * 0.5 + 0.5]),
        
        # Yellow hex (7)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y_norm, yel_hex_x_norm,
                   rel_hex_dy, rel_hex_dx,
                   dist_hex, yel_hex_exists,
                   jnp.sign(rel_hex_dy) * 0.5 + 0.5]),
        
        # Front tile (3 + 25 = 28)
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_adj_hex, front_is_floor]),
        front_tile_oh,
        front_color_oh,
        
        # Adjacency & phase (5)
        jnp.array([agent_adj_hex, phase_need_pickup, phase_need_place,
                   front_is_door, front_adj_hex * holding_green_ball]),
        
        # Door info (6)
        jnp.array([n_closed / 4.0, n_locked / 4.0, n_open / 4.0,
                   rel_door_dy, rel_door_dx, dist_door]),
        
        # Step (1)
        jnp.array([step_norm]),
        
        # Local view (242)
        local_obs,
    ])
    
    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
